MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JAN-04-2012 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT EMILY GRONENDYKE'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-04-2012 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT EMILY GRONENDYKE'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION AS TO WAIVER OF JURY FEES & EXPENSES. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
FEES NOT PAID. FILINGS OF EMILY GRONENDYKE ARE STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD, CASE SETTLED. TRIAL DATE REMOVED. CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA (D-501).

NOTICE OF LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION, U.D. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT GRONENDYKE, EMILY (SUED AS GRONEDYKE) LITTLEFIELD, ASHLEY ELIZABETH ASSIGNED TO REPRESENT PARTY FOR U. D. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
REMOVED FROM UD JURY CALENDAR SET FOR APR-09-2012 - CASE SETTLED.
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-05-2012 01:30 PM FOR DEPT 501
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
